---
title: "Gecco 2026: Evolutionary Computation in Practice"
---

![](https://gecco-2025.sigevo.org/dl214)

# Welcome to Evolutionary Computation in Practice (ECiP)

> **Bridging Academia and Industry in Evolutionary Computation**

The Evolutionary Computation in Practice (ECiP) track at GECCO brings together world-renowned experts from academia and industry to share their insights on real-world optimization and successful collaborations. ECiP is the place to learn how evolutionary computation is applied beyond textbooks, with a focus on practical, impactful projects and industrial partnerships.

## Why Attend ECiP?
- **Learn from the best:** Hear from speakers with decades of experience in both academic and industrial settings.
- **Real-world impact:** Discover how evolutionary computation solves real optimization problems for clients and industry partners.
- **Project management:** Gain valuable tips for managing and executing successful projects.
- **Networking:** Connect with experts and peers in a hybrid event format.

## About GECCO
GECCO is sponsored by the Association for Computing Machinery Special Interest Group on Genetic and Evolutionary Computation (SIGEVO).

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2em; flex-wrap: wrap;">
  <img src="https://gecco-2024.sigevo.org/acm_black_hightagline.png" alt="ACM SIGEVO" style="height: 60px;"/>
  <a href="https://twitter.com/GeccoConf"><img src="https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/GeccoConf?style=social" alt="Follow on Twitter"/></a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/events/gecco20247068155716271796224/"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-Join%20us-blue?logo=linkedin" alt="Join on LinkedIn"/></a>
</div>

---

## Explore More
- [Reference: ECiP Speakers & Talks](reference.qmd)
- [GECCO 2025](https://gecco-2025.sigevo.org/)
- [GECCO 2024](https://gecco-2024.sigevo.org/)
- [GECCO 2023](https://gecco-2023.sigevo.org/)
- [GECCO 2022](https://gecco-2022.sigevo.org/)

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
